name: parachute
description: Google Drive backup and restore addon for AirLink Panel
author: g-flame

migrations.name: create_parachute_auth_table
migrations.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS Parachute_Auth (id INTEGER NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, userId INTEGER NOT NULL, driveFolderId TEXT NOT NULL, tokenRef TEXT NOT NULL, displayName TEXT NULL, email TEXT NULL, pictureUrl TEXT NULL, createdAt DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, UNIQUE(userId), FOREIGN KEY (userId) REFERENCES Users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE)

migrations.name: create_parachute_backups_table
migrations.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS Parachute_Backups (id INTEGER NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, userId INTEGER NOT NULL, driveFileId TEXT NOT NULL, backupName TEXT NOT NULL, serverUUID TEXT NOT NULL, encrypted INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, passwordHint TEXT NULL, fileSize INTEGER NULL, createdAt DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, FOREIGN KEY (userId) REFERENCES Users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE)

migrations.name: create_parachute_backups_index
migrations.sql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_parachute_backups_user ON Parachute_Backups(userId)

migrations.name: add_parachute_backups_provider_column
migrations.sql: ALTER TABLE Parachute_Backups ADD COLUMN provider TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'google_drive'

migrations.name: create_parachute_config_table
migrations.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS Parachute_Config (id INTEGER NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, key TEXT NOT NULL, value TEXT NOT NULL, updatedAt DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, UNIQUE(key))
